extraction.one_line_summary: HAMILTON Lucas attacked late on final climb, held off MASNADA Fausto who chased solo, with WOODS Michael taking bonus seconds in third.
tactical_patterns: YATES Simon attacked immediately on final climb to fracture group before HAMILTON took stage, protecting GC leader role.
VLASOV Aleksandr attempted bridge but MAJKA Rafał covered, showing Astana willing to sacrifice domestique for aggressive positioning.
MASNADA Fausto rode solo chase entire final kilometer instead of waiting for WOODS group, revealing Deceuninck stage hunger.
WOODS Michael won bonus seconds sprint from chasing group despite being race leader, showing tactical awareness for GC defense.

rider_signals.HAMILTON Lucas: positive: first World Tour win after altitude block in Andorra targeting Giro, confirms climbing form ahead of schedule
rider_signals.MASNADA Fausto: positive: chased solo nearly catching Hamilton after working all day, exceptional form carrying from Tour of the Alps win
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: took bonus seconds from chase group despite leading race, tactically aware beyond just defending jersey
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: initiated selection on final climb but allowed domestique Hamilton to take stage, confirms Giro preparation focus
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: found wanting when YATES attacked initially, unable to follow first acceleration on final climb
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: not rushing to respond when race split on final climb, suggesting form not sharp
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: neutral: required MAJKA to cover VLASOV move for him, showing reliance on team support in critical moments
rider_signals.KNOX James: positive: made it into final selection group despite being domestique, impressive climbing to finish with GC contenders
